title: Sky Inventory
description: Nice Blue Sky in your inventory without needing any mods.
body:
# Sky-Themed Inventory GUI

Give your Minecraft interface a fresh and calming look with this sky-inspired inventory GUI. Featuring a soft blue gradient with fluffy clouds, this design replaces the default inventory background with something much more relaxing and visually appealing.

Perfect for players who prefer a minimal yet aesthetic UI, this pack keeps all slots clear and easy to navigate while enhancing the overall vibe of the game.

## ✨ Features

- Clean and modern sky-themed background
- Soft cloud visuals for a relaxing experience
- Maintains full visibility of inventory slots
- Lightweight and performance-friendly
- Compatible with standard gameplay (no clutter)

## 📦 Compatibility

Should work with most vanilla-based/Modded setups and modpacks.
Works with most resource packs (may override GUI textures)

## ⚠️ Important:

- The recepie book icon is adjusted to show on hover, to enhance the look of ths resource pack.
- To access the recepie book icon you can simply take you cursor to where the recepie icon is usually present then you will be able to see it.
